{{Quote| I assume you seek the most powerful Nightsister, Spell Weaver Leandra.|[[Saik]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TttNS">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Travel to the Nightsister Stronghold|Dathomir}}</ref>}}
'''Leandra''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Sometime following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], she operated at the [[Nightsister Stronghold]]. There, she served the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]] as a [[Spell Weaver]].<ref name="SWG:SWL" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Leandra.jpg|thumb|left|Leandra]]
Leandra was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:SWL" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Spell Weaver Leandra was added to the game with the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 1 Notes: 13 August 03|Publish 1]]" update, released on [[August 3]], 2003.<ref name="P1">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=60888|text=Publish 1: Nightsisters Cave}}</ref> Upon the release of the revamped "[[W:c:swg:Witches of Dathomir Theme Park|Witches of Dathomir Theme Park]]," introduced in the [[W:c:swg:Game Update 19|Game Update 19]] on [[December 14]], [[2010]],<ref name="GU19">{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/posts/list.m?topic_id=1160720|text=''Star Wars'' Galaxies: Game Update 19}}</ref> Leandra's original dialogues were removed from the game as the character was included in the new quest series.<ref name="SWG:Lost">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Lost|Dathomir}}</ref>
